address: Lang Suan Ratchakan Road, Tambon Nai Mueang, Amphoe Muang, Khon Kaen 40000

description.en: Regional museum showcasing Isaan history from prehistoric times through the Dvaravati and Khmer periods to modern day. Features Ban Chiang-era pottery, Dvaravati Buddhist art, and exhibits on northeastern Thai cultural heritage.
description.nl: Regionaal museum dat de Isaan-geschiedenis toont van prehistorische tijden via de Dvaravati- en Khmer-perioden tot heden. Met Ban Chiang-tijdperk aardewerk, Dvaravati boeddhistische kunst en tentoonstellingen over Noordoost-Thais cultureel erfgoed.

metaTitle.en: Khon Kaen National Museum - Top Attraction in Khon Kaen | Go2Thailand
metaTitle.nl: Khon Kaen Nationaal Museum - Top Attractie in Khon Kaen | Go2Thailand

metaDescription.en: Discover Khon Kaen National Museum. Isaan history from prehistoric times with Dvaravati art and Ban Chiang pottery.
metaDescription.nl: Ontdek Khon Kaen Nationaal Museum. Isaan-geschiedenis uit prehistorische tijden met Dvaravati-kunst en Ban Chiang aardewerk.
